army_rules.name: Reanimation Protocols
army_rules.description: If your Army Faction is NECRONS , at the end of your Command phase , each unit from your army with this ability that is on the battlefield activates its Reanimation Protocols and reanimates D3 wounds. Each time such a unit reanimates a wound: If that unit contains one or more models with fewer than their starting number of wounds remaining, select one of those models; that model regains one lost wound If all models in that unit have their starting number of wounds, but that unit is not at its Starting Strength , one destroyed model is returned to that unit with one wound remaining. Once such a unit is at its Starting Strength and all of its models have their starting number of wounds, nothing further happens. Example: A unit of Lokhust Destroyers (which have a Wounds characteristic of 3) activates its Reanimation Protocols. The unit had a Starting Strength of 3, but currently contains 2 models, and one of those models has lost 1 wound. A 3 is rolled to see how many wounds are reanimated. The first of these reanimated wounds restores the wounded Lokhust Destroyer back to 3 wounds. The second of these reanimated wounds returns the destroyed Lokhust Destroyer to the battlefield with 1 wound remaining. The third of these reanimated wounds restores one of the remaining lost wounds to the same Lokhust Destroyer that was just returned. The unit now contains 3 models, two of which have 3 wounds remaining and one of which has 2 wounds remaining.

rule.name: Command Protocols
rule.description: While a NECRONS CHARACTER model is leading this unit, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll .

enhancements.name: Veil of Darkness
enhancements.description: NECRONS model only. Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, remove that unit from the battlefield. Then, in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase , set up that unit anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models.

enhancements.name: Nether-realm Casket
enhancements.description: NECRONS model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Stealth ability.

enhancements.name: Phasal Subjugator (Aura)
enhancements.description: NECRONS model only. While a friendly NECRONS unit (excluding CHARACTER units) is within 6" of the bearer, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Enaegic Dermal Bond
enhancements.description: NECRONS model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

stratagems.name: PROTOCOL OF THE ETERNAL REVENANT
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS INFANTRY CHARACTER model from your army that was just destroyed . You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: At the end of the phase, set your model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with half of its starting number of wounds remaining.
stratagems.restrictions: Each model can only be targeted with this Stratagem once per battle.
stratagems.fluff: Necron rulers possess enhanced self-repair systems.

stratagems.name: PROTOCOL OF THE UNDYING LEGIONS
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase , just after an enemy unit has resolved its attacks.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit activates its Reanimation Protocols and reanimates D3 wounds (or D3+1 wounds if a NECRONS CHARACTER is leading your unit].
stratagems.fluff: Nanoscarabs are released in boiling black clouds that whirl about the legions and effect rapid repairs

stratagems.name: PROTOCOL OF THE HUNGRY VOID
stratagems.when: Fight phase .
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit. In addition, If a NECRONS CHARACTER is leading your unit, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1. (this is not cumulative with any other modifiers that improve Armour Penetration].
stratagems.fluff: Necrons strike with data-augmented accuracy.

stratagems.name: PROTOCOL OF THE SUDDEN STORM
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase .
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] ability. In addition, if a NECRONS CHARACTER is leading your unit, until the end of the phase, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for your unit.
stratagems.fluff: Arcing energies leap from one Necron to the next, lending them unnatural speed and surety

stratagems.name: PROTOCOL OF THE CONQUERING TYRANT
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase .
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit within half range, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If a NECRONS CHARACTER is leading your unit, until the end of the phase, you can re-roll the Hit roll for that attack instead.
stratagems.fluff: The legions employ the strategies of their masters in perfect synchronicity, laying down hails of mechanically coordinated fire.

stratagems.name: PROTOCOL OF THE VENGEFUL STARS
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase , just after an enemy unit destroys a NECRONS unit from your army.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS CHARACTER unit from your army that was within 6" of that NECRONS unit when it was destroyed .
stratagems.effect: After the attacking unit has resolved its attacks, your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but it must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.
stratagems.fluff: Criss-crossfire leaps from the Necron ranks, forming a blazing corona of deadly energy to punish those who dare threaten the indignant nobility's legions.

rule.name: Annihilation Protocol
rule.description: Each time a DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit from your army declares a charge , you can re-roll the Charge roll . If one or more targets of that charge are Below Half-strength , add 1 to the Charge roll as well. Each time a DESTROYER CULT unit from your army makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, add 1 to the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack.

enhancements.name: Eternal Madness
enhancements.description: NECRONS model only. In the Fight phase , each time a model in the bearer’s unit is destroyed , if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking models unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

enhancements.name: Ingrained Superiority
enhancements.description: NECRONS model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, on a Critical Wound , improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

enhancements.name: Soulless Reaper
enhancements.description: DESTROYER CULT model only. Each time an enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer’s unit is selected to Fall Back , roll one D6: on a 3+, that unit cannot Fall Back this phase and must Remain Stationary .

enhancements.name: Eldritch Nightmare
enhancements.description: DESTROYER CULT model only. At the start of the Fight phase , each enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer must take a Battle-shock test .

stratagems.name: MASKS OF DEATH
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase , just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll .
stratagems.fluff: Wreathed in tendrils of transdimensional shadow that intensify their deathly visages, these killing machines evoke such terror that steady aims tremble and blade arms are sapped of strength.

stratagems.name: THE SPOOR OF FRAILTY
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase .
stratagems.target: One DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model from your unit makes an attack that targets a unit below Starting Strength , add 1 to the Hit roll . If the target is Below Half-strength , add 1 to the Wound roll as well.
stratagems.fluff: Where one foe falls, logic dictates all others must follow. Where blood is shed, ever must more flow.

stratagems.name: MURDEROUS REANIMATION
stratagems.when: Fight phase .
stratagems.target: One DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit from your army that has just destroyed an enemy unit, or just caused an enemy unit that was not Below Half-strength to become Below Half-strength.
stratagems.effect: Your unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate.
stratagems.fluff: Through some quirk of their kind's shared insanity, a spark of gruesome satisfaction surges through them with every enemy life snuffed out, triggering quiescent power reserves that drive them onwards.

stratagems.name: PITILESS HUNTERS
stratagems.when: Fight phase .
stratagems.target: One DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move , it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".
stratagems.fluff: Driven into a state of hyperaggression, an Annihilation Legion's most eager hunters plunge into their prey's midst to maximise their butchery.

stratagems.name: BLOOD-FUELLED CRUELTY
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase , just after an enemy unit ends a Fall Back move .
stratagems.target: One DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit from your army that started the phase within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds ; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds. Your unit can then make a Normal move , but must end that move as close as possible to that enemy unit.
stratagems.fluff: Whatever strange afflictions eat away at the sanity of Destroyers and Flayed Ones, mercy is not one of them.

stratagems.name: INSANITY’S IRE
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase , just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed by the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move , but must end that move as close as possible to that enemy unit.
stratagems.fluff: To strike down one horror is merely to draw the rest of the pack's insane and murderous focus.

rule.name: Power Matrix
rule.description: Certain areas of the battlefield are considered to be within your army’s Power Matrix, as follows: Your deployment zone is always within your army’s Power Matrix. At the start of any phase , if you control at least half of the objective markers within No Man’s Land, until the end of that phase, No Man’s Land is within your army’s Power Matrix. At the start of any phase, if you control at least half of the objective markers within your opponent’s deployment zone, until the end of that phase, your opponent’s deployment zone is within your army’s Power Matrix. Each time a model in a CRYPTEK or CANOPTEK unit from your army makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If such a unit is wholly within your army’s Power Matrix, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

enhancements.name: Dimensional Sanctum
enhancements.description: CRYPTEK model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Infiltrators ability.

enhancements.name: Hyperphasic Fulcrum
enhancements.description: CRYPTEK model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, if that unit is wholly within your army’s Power Matrix , each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

enhancements.name: Autodivinator
enhancements.description: CRYPTEK model only. Each time your opponent gains a CP as the result of an ability, roll one D6: on a 2+, you also gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Metalodermal Tesla Weave
enhancements.description: CRYPTEK model only. Once per phase, when an enemy unit selects the bearer’s unit as a target of a charge , roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds ; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: CURSE OF THE CRYPTEK
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase , just after an enemy unit has shot or fought.
stratagems.target: One CRYPTEK model from your army that was destroyed by one of the attacking unit’s attacks. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a friendly CANOPTEK model makes an attack that targets the attacking unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll .
stratagems.fluff: Vindictive Crypteks often hardwire vengeance sub protocols into the ancient cores of their unliving servants, by which a last act of reprisal is assured.

stratagems.name: CYNOSURE OF ERADICATION
stratagems.when: The start of your Shooting phase or the start of the Fight phase .
stratagems.target: One CRYPTEK or CANOPTEK unit from your army that is wholly within your army’s Power Matrix .
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by CRYPTEK or CANOPTEK models in your unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.
stratagems.fluff: Only the foolish tread where a Cryptek has set their sights, for these arcane scientists will suffer no threat to their works.

stratagems.name: SOLAR PULSE
stratagems.when: Start of your Shooting phase .
stratagems.target: One CRYPTEK model from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one objective marker within 18" of your CRYPTEK model. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by friendly NECRONS models have the [IGNORES COVER] ability while targeting units within range of that objective marker.
stratagems.fluff: By remotely accessing a hidden engine's most illuminating protocols, a Cryptek can release the awesome power of a caged solar flare.

stratagems.name: REACTIVE SUBROUTINES
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase , just after an enemy unit ends a Normal , Advance or Fall Back move .
stratagems.target: One CANOPTEK unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".
stratagems.fluff: Canoptek constructs spent the long Great Sleep in watchful vigilance. Triggering a surge of power, they are capable of responsive manoeuvres to outwit the swiftest of attackers.

stratagems.name: COUNTERTEMPORAL SHIFT
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase , just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One CANOPTEK unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".
stratagems.fluff: With a twist to the fabric of time, a bubble of another moment enshrouds these constructs. Strange emissions from long-dead elder stars or utter darkness from a nighttime far in the future occludes them from their master’s foes.

stratagems.name: SUBOPTIMAL FACADE
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Charge phase , just after an enemy unit has declared a charge .
stratagems.target: One CANOPTEK unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge and is wholly within your army’s Power Matrix .
stratagems.effect: Your unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate.
stratagems.fluff: Canoptek constructs use sophisticated metalogic to craft sinister ambushes. Luring the foe in by appearing at suboptimal operation, a surge of reanimation protocols suddenly swells their numbers.

rule.name: Worthy Foes
rule.description: In your Command phase , select one enemy unit. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a NOBLE , LYCHGUARD or TRIARCH unit from your army makes an attack that targets that unit, add 1 to the Wound roll .

enhancements.name: Honourable Combatant
enhancements.description: OVERLORD model only. Each time the bearer’s unit destroys an enemy CHARACTER unit, your opponent loses 1CP if they have any.

enhancements.name: Unflinching Will
enhancements.description: OVERLORD model only. The bearer’s melee weapons have the [PRECISION] and [ANTI-INFANTRY 5+] abilities.

enhancements.name: Warrior Noble
enhancements.description: OVERLORD model only. Each time a melee attack targets the bearer’s unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll .

enhancements.name: Eternal Conqueror
enhancements.description: OVERLORD model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within range of an objective marker , you can re-roll the Hit roll .

stratagems.name: YOUR TIME IS NIGH
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after your opponent’s WARLORD is destroyed .
stratagems.target: Your NECRONS WARLORD .
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time an enemy unit takes a Battle-shock or Leadership test , subtract 1 from the result.
stratagems.fluff: With a pulse of necroneural energy that erodes the foe’s will, the Necron commander declares the fall of the enemy general, promising their remaining forces that it is only a matter of time until they join their master in ignoble death.

stratagems.name: ENSLAVED ARTIFICE
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase .
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit from your army (excluding TITANIC units) that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit .
stratagems.fluff: It is not only android soldiery that be compelled to serve. With a command, prized war engines and ornate weapons are empowered to hyperlethality.

stratagems.name: NANOASSEMBLY PROTOCOLS
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase , just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS VEHICLE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.
stratagems.fluff: A tomb world’s war engines are the pride of its nobility and they will suffer no affront to them, demanding the reassembly of slablike armour atom by atom even as the foe seek to sunder the vehicles.

stratagems.name: SENTINELS OF ETERNITY
stratagems.when: Fight phase , just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One LYCHGUARD or TRIARCH PRAETORIANS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed , if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making attacks , and is then removed from play.
stratagems.fluff: Lychguard never tire, nor give a thought to their own safety over that of their master. With parrying blows and blocking shots they protect their liege even as they continue to strike down their opponents.

stratagems.name: SUFFER NO RIVAL
stratagems.when: Fight phase .
stratagems.target: One LYCHGUARD or TRIARCH unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability.
stratagems.fluff: Few enemy are worthy of a duel. What dangerous vermin are encountered are prioritised for execution to safeguard the nobles' honour.

stratagems.name: TERRITORIAL OBSESSION
stratagems.when: Your Command phase .
stratagems.target: One LYCHGUARD or TRIARCH unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in your unit. If your unit has the VEHICLE keyword, add 3 to the Objective Control characteristic instead.
stratagems.fluff: The ancient and arrogant will of the nobility drives their powerful servants to stand their ground defiantly as they claim the dynasty's rightful lands.

rule.name: Hyperphasing
rule.description: At the end of your opponent’s turn, you can select a number of NECRONS units from your army (excluding units that are within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units). The maximum number of units you can select depends on the battle size, as follows: BATTLE SIZE NUMBER OF UNITS Incursion Up to 1 units Strike Force Up to 2 units Onslaught Up to 3 units Once you have made your selections, remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves .

enhancements.name: Dimensional Overseer
enhancements.description: NECRONS model only. While the bearer is on the battlefield or in Strategic Reserves , add one to the number of units from your army that you can select for the Hyperphasing rule.

enhancements.name: Arisen Tyrant
enhancements.description: NECRONS model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the bearer’s unit was set up on the battlefield this turn, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

enhancements.name: Hyperspatial Transfer Node
enhancements.description: NECRONS model only. Each time the bearer’s unit Advances , do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Osteoclave Fulcrum
enhancements.description: NECRONS model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Deep Strike ability.

stratagems.name: HYPERPHASIC RECALL
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase , just after an enemy unit has shot or fought.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS INFANTRY unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks and one friendly MONOLITH model.
stratagems.effect: Remove your INFANTRY unit from the battlefield and then set it back up anywhere on the battlefield that is wholly within 6" of your MONOLITH model and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.fluff: Obeying recall protocols, threatened tomb defenders will phase out of existence, only to be relocated to a more advantageous position by the tomb's hulking Monoliths.

stratagems.name: QUANTUM DEFLECTION
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase , just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS VEHICLE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save .
stratagems.fluff: Necron quantum shielding is a true marvel of techno-arcana. Channelled with energy reserves from the rising tomb structures, the shielding is capable of adaptive remodulation to diffuse and deflect the most powerful enemy attacks.

stratagems.name: REANIMATION CRYPTS
stratagems.when: Your Command phase .
stratagems.target: Your NECRONS WARLORD .
stratagems.effect: For each of your NECRONS units in Reserves , that Reserves unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate.
stratagems.fluff: There is no rest for Necrons who fall in the service of their master. In dark crypts, their bodies are repaired and they are dispatched once more to war.

stratagems.name: COSMIC PRECISION
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase .
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit from your army (excluding MONSTER units) that is arriving using the Deep Strike or Hyperphasing abilities this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models.
stratagems.restrictions: A unit targeted with this Stratagem is not eligible to declare a charge in the same turn.
stratagems.fluff: With a sanity-defying mechanism at the heart of the tomb, dynastic astromancers divine the pre-aligned point in space and time where a crucial role can be played in the wider battle plan.

stratagems.name: DIMENSIONAL CORRIDOR
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase .
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit from your army that was set up on the battlefield this turn using the Eternity Gate ability of a MONOLITH model that started the turn on the battlefield.
stratagems.effect: Your unit is eligible to charge this phase.
stratagems.fluff: As the tomb's warriors pass through a dimensional displacement corridor, the passage’s surface is lit with data-glyphs providing hyperlogical tactical information. When they step from an eternity gate, they are already prepared for the hunt.

stratagems.name: ENTROPIC DAMPING
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase , just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One TITANIC model from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks and is within 18" of the attacking unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in the attacking unit have the [HAZARDOUS] ability.
stratagems.fluff: Towering war engines rise from an erupting tomb in its defence, directing entropic energies to weaken and fracture the enemies' own weapons and turning them into dangerous tools only the desperate would use.

rule.name: Relentless Onslaught
rule.description: Each time a NECRONS model (excluding MONSTER models) from your army makes an attack that targets a unit within range of one or more objective markers , add 1 to the Hit roll . In addition, ranged weapons equipped by NECRONS VEHICLE and NECRONS MOUNTED models (excluding TITANIC models) from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability.

enhancements.name: Dread Majesty (Aura)
enhancements.description: OVERLORD or CATACOMB COMMAND BARGE model only. While a friendly NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTER and TITANIC units) is within 6" of the bearer, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

enhancements.name: Miniaturised Nebuloscope
enhancements.description: NECRONS model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

enhancements.name: Demanding Leader
enhancements.description: NECRONS model only. In your Command phase , select one friendly NECRONS VEHICLE or NECRONS MOUNTED unit (excluding TITANIC units) within 6" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase , that unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back .

enhancements.name: Chrono-impedance Fields
enhancements.description: NECRONS model only. In your Command phase , select one friendly NECRONS VEHICLE or NECRONS MOUNTED unit (excluding TITANIC units) within 6" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in that unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

stratagems.name: MERCILESS RECLAMATION
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase .
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTER and TITANIC units) from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, if the target of that attack is within range of one or more objective markers , add 1 to the Wound roll .
stratagems.fluff: The Necrons are driven to reclaim what is theirs, exterminating all who would impede such efforts without mercy.

stratagems.name: UNYIELDING FORMS
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase , just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS VEHICLE or NECRONS MOUNTED unit (excluding TITANIC units) from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets a model in your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll .
stratagems.fluff: Wrought from living metal and further protected by the arcane technologies of Crypteks, the forms of Necron vehicles and steeds are almost impervious to conventional weapons.

stratagems.name: CHRONOSHIFT
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase .
stratagems.target: One NECRONS VEHICLE or NECRONS MOUNTED unit (excluding TITANIC units) from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.
stratagems.fluff: The time-bending technologies in the nobility’s powerful vehicles allow them to traverse the battlefield in stuttering bursts of hypervelocity.

stratagems.name: DIMENSIONAL TUNNEL
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase .
stratagems.target: One NECRONS VEHICLE or NECRONS MOUNTED unit (excluding TITANIC units) from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit can move horizontally through models and terrain features .
stratagems.fluff: Using phase-shifting technology, Necron war engines can slip into alternate dimensions, leaving only ghostly traces as they move through solid matter.

stratagems.name: ENDLESS SERVITUDE
stratagems.when: End of your Fight phase .
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTER and TITANIC units) from your army that is within range of one or more objective markers you control.
stratagems.effect: Your unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate.
stratagems.fluff: Should the unclean thralls of lesser species threaten dynastic territories, the fallen Necron soldiery will rise to repel the interlopers.

stratagems.name: REACTIVE REPOSITION
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase , just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit from your army (excluding MONSTER and TITANIC units) that was the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".
stratagems.fluff: Subroutines buried deep within the neural networks of Necron soldiers and crews enable them to react instantaneously to targeting locks, repositioning themselves to evade incoming fire or close in upon the foe.

rule.name: Technosorcerous Augmentations
rule.description: Ranged weapons equipped by CRYPTEK models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability. In your Shooting phase , each time a CRYPTEK unit from your army is selected to shoot, select one of the following abilities: [ANTI-INFANTRY 3+] , [ANTI-MOUNTED 4+] , [ASSAULT] , [HEAVY] , [IGNORES COVER] . Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have that ability.

enhancements.name: Quantum Abacus
enhancements.description: NECRONS model only. Each time you select the bearer’s unit as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6, adding 1 if it is within range of one or more objectives: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Atomic Disintegrators
enhancements.description: CRYPTEK model only. In your Shooting phase , each time the bearer’s unit is selected to shoot, when selecting an ability for the Technosorcerous Augmentations Detachment rule, you can also select from the following abilities: [ANTI-MONSTER 5+] , [ANTI-VEHICLE 5+] .

enhancements.name: Gauntlet of Compression
enhancements.description: NECRONS model only. Add 6" to the Range characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Gravitic Bolas
enhancements.description: CRYPTEK model only. In your Shooting phase , after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks (excluding TITANIC units); until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that unit.

stratagems.name: MOLECULAR TARGETING
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase .
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the following: that attack’s Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill characteristic; the Hit roll . If your unit has the CRYPTEK keyword, you can also ignore any or all modifiers to the Wound roll .
stratagems.fluff: Targeting analysis of the targets’ molecular makeup allows all attempts at shielding or obfuscation to be bypassed with contemptuous ease.

stratagems.name: MICROSCARAB SWARM
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase , just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One CRYPTEK INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: If your unit has the NECRON WARRIORS keyword, until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 5+ invulnerable save . If your unit has the IMMORTALS keyword, until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.
stratagems.fluff: This thrumming cloud of minute nanoscarabs whirls around the Necrons, affecting instantaneous repairs.

stratagems.name: ANIMUS CURSE
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase , just after an enemy unit has shot or fought.
stratagems.target: One CRYPTEK model from your army that was destroyed by one of the attacking unit’s attacks. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a friendly NECRONS model makes an attack that targets the attacking unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll .
stratagems.fluff: A portion of the Cryptek’s animus clings to the battlefield just long enough to possess their servants and use them to exact revenge.

stratagems.name: SYNERGISTIC EMPOWERMENT
stratagems.when: Start of your Shooting phase .
stratagems.target: One CRYPTEK unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one friendly NECRONS model (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES ) within 12" of a CRYPTEK model in your unit. Until the end of the phase, that friendly NECRONS model has the CRYPTEK keyword.
stratagems.fluff: Quantum reservoirs of potent energies held within this Cryptek’s warrior jewellery release a fragment of their charge to augment nearby Necron forces.

stratagems.name: UNTAPPED POWER
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase .
stratagems.target: One CRYPTEK unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit is selected to shoot, when selecting an ability for the Technosorcerous Augmentations Detachment Rule, you can select one additional ability from those available.
stratagems.fluff: Accessing previously undreamed of skeins of cosmic power, the Cryptek unleashes terrible destructive energies onto the battlefield.

stratagems.name: POTENTIALITY SYPHON
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Command phase .
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit from your army within range of one or more objective markers .
stratagems.effect: Your unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate. If it is a CRYPTEK unit, it reanimates an additional 1 wound.
stratagems.fluff: Drawing upon the accumulated precausal potential energies that coalesce around significant locations, the conclave are able to steal that power and use it to trigger the unrealized probable remanifestation matrices of their own forces.

rule.name: Cold Fervour
rule.description: Add 2 to the Strength characteristic of weapons equipped by DESTROYER CULT models from your army. The first time each turn that a DESTROYER CULT unit from your army makes attacks that destroy a unit or cause it to become Below Half-strength , after that unit has finished resolving its attacks, until the end of the turn, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of weapons equipped by friendly NECRONS models (excluding DESTROYER CULT , MONSTER and TITANIC models).

enhancements.name: Destroyer Ankh
enhancements.description: CATACOMB COMMAND BARGE or OVERLORD model only. The bearer has the DESTROYER CULT keyword. Add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit and add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer.

enhancements.name: Murdermind
enhancements.description: CRYPTEK model only. The bearer has the DESTROYER CULT keyword and during the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a DESTROYER CULT unit (excluding CHARACTER units). If you do, the bearer’s unit cannot contain any models without the DESTROYER CULT keyword. Add 3" to the Move characteristic of the bearer.
keyword_restrictions: CRYPTEK DESTROYER CULT DESTROYER CULT CHARACTER DESTROYER CULT
keywords_mentioned: CRYPTEK DESTROYER CULT DESTROYER CULT CHARACTER DESTROYER CULT

enhancements.name: Mark of the Nekrosor
enhancements.description: DESTROYER CULT model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll .

enhancements.name: Cursed Circlet
enhancements.description: DESTROYER CULT model only. Each time an enemy unit is selected to shoot, after that unit has shot, if any models from the bearer’s unit were destroyed as a result of those attacks, the bearer’s unit can make a Surge move. To do so, roll one D6: the bearer’s unit can be moved a number of inches up to the result, but the bearer’s unit must finish that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT ). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. A unit cannot make a Surge move while it is Battle-shocked .

stratagems.name: METHODICAL MURDER
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase .
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES ) from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.
stratagems.fluff: In the grip of the Destroyer madness, these Necrons strike and slay with inhuman speed and efficiency.

stratagems.name: IMAGE OF DEATH
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase , just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One DESTROYER CULT unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll .
stratagems.fluff: Confronted with these android spectres of terminal mortality, even the most courageous enemies find their aim wavering and their limbs shaking.

stratagems.name: MORTIS PROTOCOLS
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase , just after the first time a DESTROYER CULT unit from your army destroys an enemy unit this turn.
stratagems.target: One friendly NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES ) within 9" of that DESTROYER CULT unit.
stratagems.effect: The friendly unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate.
stratagems.fluff: In the absolute destruction of their enemies, the corrupted Necrons find fresh purpose and a macabre simulacrum of new life.

stratagems.name: DRIVEN TO BUTCHERY
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or your Charge phase .
stratagems.target: One DESTROYER CULT unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced .
stratagems.restrictions: You can only use this Stratagem once per turn.
stratagems.fluff: The murderous goad of the Destroyer madness pushes these android killers to seemingly impossible efforts to get to grips with the foe.

stratagems.name: SPREADING MADNESS
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase .
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES ) from your army that has not declared a charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit declares a charge, if one or more targets of that charge are within Engagement Range of one or more friendly units, add 2 to the Charge roll .
stratagems.fluff: It is as though witnessing other Necrons engaged in acts of merciless butchery stokes the Destroyer madness in their fellows.

stratagems.name: UNNATURAL AGGRESSION
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Charge phase .
stratagems.target: One NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES ) from your army that is within 6" of one or more enemy units and would be eligible to declare a charge against one or more of those enemy units if it were your Charge phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit now declares a charge that only targets one or more of those enemy units, and you resolve that charge. Note that even if this charge is successful, your unit does not receive any Charge bonus this turn.
stratagems.fluff: The android soldiery of the cursed legion are maddened with the desire to engage and slay their victims at close quarters.

rule.name: Cosmic Distortion
rule.description: NECRONS MONSTER units from your army have the following ability: Distortion Fields (Aura): While an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit, it is unravelling. While an enemy unit is unravelling, each time an attack targets that unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. At the start of each phase, for each NECRONS MONSTER unit from your army, that unit can suffer 3 mortal wounds . If it does, until the end of the phase, the range of that unit’s Distortion Fields Aura ability is increased to 9". Designer’s Note: If your army contains more than one TRANSCENDENT C’TAN unit, each of those units must take the Reletavistic Tether ability. RESTRICTIONS When mustering your army, each NECRONS MONSTER unit from your army has the relevant Necrodermal Binding ability shown below, and you must increase the points cost of each of those units by the amount shown in the Munitorum Field Manual . If this causes your army to exceed the points limit for the battle you are playing, you cannot include that unit in your army.

enhancements.name: Autodivinator
enhancements.description: CRYPTEK model only. Each time your opponent gains a CP as the result of an ability, roll one D6: on a 2+, you also gain 1CP.

stratagems.name: TARGETING ALGORITHMS
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase .
stratagems.target: One CRYPTEK model from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your model makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll .
stratagems.fluff: A Cryptek's enhanced oculars possess exceptional visual acuity. Even in pitch-dark corridors, there can be no hiding from a Cryptek's wrath.

stratagems.name: QUANTUM FLARE-SHIELD
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase , just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One CRYPTEK model from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your model has a 4+ invulnerable save .
stratagems.fluff: Crypteks enhance their living metal forms with all manner of reactive defences, including single-use quantum shields that flare into life to deflect incoming fire.

stratagems.name: PHASE-SHIFT
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase .
stratagems.target: One CANOPTEK WRAITHS unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: The next time your unit is selected to move this phase, models in that unit can move through Walls and closed Hatchways as if they were not there, but when doing so, no model can move more than 6".
stratagems.restrictions: You can only use this Stratagem once.
stratagems.fluff: A Canoptek Wraith's dimensional destabilisation matrix allows it to phase through solid matter to breach sealed hatches and even solid walls.

stratagems.name: NANOSCARAB VIRUS
stratagems.when: End of your Movement phase .
stratagems.target: One CRYPTEK unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: For each open Hatchway within 3" of your unit, you can close that Hatchway.
stratagems.restrictions: You can only use this Stratagem once.
stratagems.fluff: The Necrons possess swarms of minute nanoscarabs that burrow into power networks and wrest control of cogitator systems.

stratagems.name: PROTOCOL OF THE UNDYING LEGIONS
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase , just after an enemy unit has resolved its attacks.
stratagems.target: One NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit activates its Reanimation Protocols and reanimates D3 wounds (or D3+1 wounds if a NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS CHARACTER is leading your unit].
stratagems.fluff: Nanoscarabs are released in boiling black clouds that whirl about the legions and effect rapid repairs
keywords_mentioned: NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS
NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS CHARACTER
target_keywords: NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS

stratagems.name: COSMIC PRECISION
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase .
stratagems.target: One NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS unit from your army (excluding MONSTER units) that is arriving using the Deep Strike or Hyperphasing abilities this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models.
stratagems.restrictions: A unit targeted with this Stratagem is not eligible to declare a charge in the same turn.
stratagems.fluff: With a sanity-defying mechanism at the heart of the tomb, dynastic astromancers divine the pre-aligned point in space and time where a crucial role can be played in the wider battle plan.
keywords_mentioned: NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS MONSTER
target_keywords: NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS

stratagems.name: PROTOCOL OF THE CONQUERING TYRANT
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase .
stratagems.target: One NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit within half range, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If a NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS CHARACTER is leading your unit, until the end of the phase, you can re-roll the Hit roll for that attack instead.
stratagems.fluff: The legions employ the strategies of their masters in perfect synchronicity, laying down hails of mechanically coordinated fire.
keywords_mentioned: NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS
NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS CHARACTER
target_keywords: NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS NECRONS

stratagems.name: REACTIVE SUBROUTINES
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase , just after an enemy unit ends a Normal , Advance or Fall Back move .
stratagems.target: One CANOPTEK unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".
stratagems.fluff: Canoptek constructs spent the long Great Sleep in watchful vigilance. Triggering a surge of power, they are capable of responsive manoeuvres to outwit the swiftest of attackers.

stratagems.name: COMMAND RE-ROLL
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after you make an Advance roll , a Charge roll , a Desperate Escape test or a Hazardous test for a unit from your army, or a Hit roll , a Wound roll , a Damage roll or a saving throw for a model in that unit, or a roll to determine the number of attacks made with a weapon equipped by a model in that unit. If you are using fast dice rolling , this Stratagem can still be used after rolling multiple rolls or saving throws at once.
stratagems.target: That unit or model from your army.
stratagems.effect: You re-roll that roll, test or saving throw. If you are using fast dice rolling, select one of those rolls or saving throws to re-roll.
stratagems.fluff: A great commander can bend even the vagaries of fate and fortune to their will, the better to ensure victory.
